uplink.description: rain only: 0x06 0x81 sensor record, sensorvalue=10 -> rainlevel 5
uplink._note: Upstream ran.js decodes {rainlevel:5} (10 * 0.5); mapped to rain.cumulative (device's own calibrated collected-rain unit).

uplink.description: full reading: air temperature, humidity, rain, battery
uplink._note: Upstream: {airtemperature_C:21, humidity:65, rainlevel:12, bat_volt:12, bat_mAh:3000}. 0x08 air temp 210/10; 0x81 rain 24*0.5; 0x12 battery 120/10 V + 0x0bb8 mAh.
Upstream: {a_status:1, a_type:3, a_value:50, alarm:'Heavyrain on with 50 l/m3'}. Diagnostic alarm; no vocabulary key, surfaced as extras.
Upstream returns {errors:['invalid FPort']} for any fPort != 10.

uplink.description: unknown sensor type aborts rather than mis-walking the stream
uplink._note: Upstream silently sets data.error='sensor type? ...'; we return a hard error instead to avoid emitting a bare/garbage measurement.
